name: com.setnet.statesync.unity
description: Unity components for SetNet state replication: NetworkObject, NetworkTransform, NetworkAnimator, NetworkRigidbody, NetworkBehaviour, and a NetworkManager that spawns/despawns networked prefabs and drives interpolation. Requires the SetNet, SetNet.StateSync and SetNet.Unity assemblies (add via NuGetForUnity or as DLLs).
